raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to move files directly under /workspace to root /, excluding subfolders. Use mv /workspace/* / but avoid directories. Use find -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec mv {} / \; . So command: find /workspace -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec mv {} / \; .
raw_output_payload.reasoning_content: Need to move files directly under /workspace to root /, excluding subfolders. Use mv /workspace/* / but avoid directories. Use find -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec mv {} / \; . So command: find /workspace -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec mv {} / \; .
